sqlMap.select: select * from ServicesForClientOfFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ServicesForClientKey = #ServicesForClientKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into ServicesForClientOfFirmLW(ServicesForClientKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#ServicesForClientKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, ServicesForClientKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ServicesForClientOfFirmLW where ServicesForClientKey = #ServicesForClientKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update ServicesForClientOfFirmLW set
LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where ServicesForClientKey = #ServicesForClientKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from ServicesForClientOfFirmLW where ServicesForClientKey = #ServicesForClientKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from ServicesForClientOfFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ServicesForClientKey = #ServicesForClientKey#
sqlMap.select: select LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, ServicesForClientKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from ServicesForClientOfFirmLW where ServicesForClientKey = #ServicesForClientKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select ServicesForClientKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from ServicesForClientOfFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and ServicesForClientKey = #ServicesForClientKey#
